'''''Tales from the Empire''''' is a short story anthology about the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the fourth installment in the [[Tales series|''Tales'' book series]]. The short stories were selected from the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]''. It begins with an introduction titled "A Galaxy Filled with Stories" by editor [[Peter M. Schweighofer]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Culled from the pages of the ''Star Wars Adventure Journal'', one of the most popular ''Star Wars'' magazines in the field today, comes this exciting new short-story collection. Here are stories from such award-winning and ''New York Times'' bestselling authors as [[Timothy Zahn]], [[Michael A. Stackpole]], and [[Kathy Tyers]] as well as exciting newcomers, including [[Erin Endom]], [[Laurie Burns]], and [[Patricia A. Jackson]]. From the desperate flight of a civilian mail courier carrying vital [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] intelligence through an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade, to a suicidal commando raid on an impregnable Imperial prison, to a [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] smuggler mysteriously hired by an actor turned [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] turned Imperial [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] for one final transformation, these tales capture all the high adventure, imaginative genius, and nonstop action that are the hallmarks of the ''[[Star Wars]]'' saga.''

''What's more, the centerpiece of this magnificent collection is the short novel ''Side Trip'', the first-ever collaboration between [[Timothy Zahn]] and [[Michael A. Stackpole]], in which a freighter smuggling arms for the Rebels is commandeered by an Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] led by a mysterious helmeted figure who claims to be the notorious bounty hunter [[Jodo Kast]]. It is all part of a devious plan that includes [[Hal Horn|Hal]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], who are working undercover to nail the infamous [[Corellia/Legends|Corellian]] warlord [[Zekka Thyne]]. But one slip up can get them all killed.''

#"'''[[First Contact]]'''" by [[Timothy Zahn]]
#"'''[[Tinian on Trial]]'''" by [[Kathy Tyers]]
#"'''[[The Final Exit]]'''" by [[Patricia A. Jackson]]

#"'''[[Retreat from Coruscant]]'''" by [[Laurie Burns]]
#"'''[[A Certain Point of View (short story)|A Certain Point of View]]'''" by [[Charlene Newcomb]]
#"'''[[Blaze of Glory (short story)|Blaze of Glory]]'''" by [[Tony Russo]]
#"'''[[Slaying Dragons]]'''" by [[Angela Phillips]]
#"'''[[Do No Harm]]'''" by [[Erin Endom]]
#'''''[[Side Trip]]''''' by Timothy Zahn ('''''Part One''''' and '''''Part Four''''') and Michael A. Stackpole ('''''Part Two''''' and '''''Part Three''''')

==Continuity==
Despite being on the cover, neither [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] nor his ship [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']] appear in the anthology. The closest reference is a mention of Fett's name in ''[[Side Trip]]'', though in an ironic twist, Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] does don Mandalorian armor in the guise of notorious Fett impersonator [[Jodo Kast]].
